news.summary: BT Brands, headquartered in Minnetonka, Minnesota, disclosed its financial performance for the initial quarter ending on March 30, 2025. Alongside their 41.7% stake in Bagger Dave’s Burger Tavern, which boasts five outlets, and with stock listings of Nasdaq: BTBD and BTBDW, BT Brands oversees a sum of fifteen eateries. This total includes seven Burger Time fast-food restaurants situated across the North Central US (referred to as “BTND”). Additionally, they have a stake in the OTCMarkets-listed BDVB.
news.headline: BT Brands reports Q1 2025 results; 15 restaurants including 7 Burger Time and 5 Bagger Dave's.

news.summary: In Hilliard, Ohio, Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. (NYSE: WMS) revealed a significant announcement. The company, known for its groundbreaking water management solutions in stormwater and onsite wastewater sectors, recently shared that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a total annual cash dividend for its shareholders. The approved dividend stands at $0.72 per share, reflecting a noteworthy 13% hike compared to the previous year's dividend distribution. Scott Barbour, the President and Chief Executive Officer of Advanced Drainage Systems, expressed gratitude for this development.
news.headline: Advanced Drainage Systems increases quarterly cash dividend to $0.72 per share, up by 13% from previous year. CEO Scott Barbour.

news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on May 15, 2025, HUMAIN, a cutting-edge AI company fully owned by PIF, has revealed a significant collaboration with Luma, a prominent player in multimodal generative AI technology. This partnership aims to push the boundaries of innovation and enhance capabilities in the field. HUMAIN's partnership with Luma, known for its revolutionary video models, marks a key step in their mission to redefine technological possibilities.
news.headline: HUMAIN partners with Luma to revolutionize gaming/entertainment. PIF-owned AI company joins hands with AI innovator Luma.

news.summary: NetEase, a leading Chinese video game publisher, exceeded Q1 earnings expectations with robust sales, causing its stock to soar. The success of their new game 'Marvel Rivals' contributed to this impressive performance. The company's positive financial results surpassed market projections and drew attention from investors and analysts alike.
news.headline: NetEase, a Chinese game publisher, exceeded Q1 earnings estimates with strong sales, leading to a surge in stock price.

news.summary: In Hilliard, Ohio, Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. (NYSE: WMS), a top provider of water management solutions in the stormwater and onsite wastewater sectors, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on March 31, 2025. For the fourth quarter of Fiscal 2025, net sales saw a 5.8% decline, amounting to approximately $615.8 million. Net income also decreased by 19.6%, totaling $76.8 million, while diluted net income per share dropped by 18.2% to $0.99. Adjusted EBITD was not provided in the information provided.
news.headline: Advanced Drainage Systems reported a 5.8% decrease in net sales to $615.8 million in Q4 2025, with net income down 19.6% to $76.8 million.

news.summary: In Centennial, Colorado, Westwater Resources, Inc. (NYSE American: WWR), a company focusing on energy technology and battery-grade natural graphite development, has disclosed its performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company is glad to report its business and financial developments for this period. Noteworthy figures include anticipated Phase I construction expenses for the Kellyton Graphite Plant standing at $245 million. Additionally, Westwater shipped a customer sample exceeding 800 kg, which was generated at t.
news.headline: Westwater Resources reports $245 million Phase I construction costs for Kellyton Graphite Plant in Q1 2025.

news.headline: Quarterhill reports Q1 2025 financial results as a leading provider of tolling solutions in ITS industry.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, NACCO Industries® disclosed that their Board of Directors approved a standard quarterly cash dividend of 25.25 cents per share, marking an 11% rise from the previous dividend of 22.75 cents per share. NACCO Industries® is listed on NYSE under the symbol NC.
news.headline: NACCO Industries raises dividend by 11%, from 22.75 to 25.25 cents per share. Board of Directors declared increase.

news.summary: Trimble, a leading company in the transportation industry, is hosting its annual Trimble Insight Tech Conference from November 16 to 18, 2025 in Westminster, Colorado. The event will feature the latest innovations in the field. Registration is now open for the conference, which is expected to attract a large number of attendees. Trimble, listed on Nasdaq as TRMB, is known for showcasing cutting-edge technologies and trends in transportation at this celebrated event every year.
news.headline: Trimble opens registration for 2025 Insight Tech Conference in Colorado from November 16-18. Nasdaq: TRMB.

news.summary: Two recently conducted randomized trials have demonstrated the superior early patient experience with the UroLift™ System for Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia (BPH). The trials directly compared the UroLift™ System with other treatment options and found that patients reported improved outcomes and satisfaction when treated with the UroLift™ System. This advancement offers promise for individuals suffering from BPH, with data from the trials showing a significant enhancement in patient experience with a success rate ranging from 1 to 2. The results emphasize the effectiveness of the UroLift™ System in providing a better early patient experience compared to alternative treatment methods for BPH.
news.headline: Teleflex presents new data at 2025 AUA meeting showing UroLift™ System superiority in 2 BPH trials.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Hyperscale Data, Inc. disclosed plans to resume Bitcoin mining through its subsidiary Sentinum, Inc. at a Montana site by June 10, 2025. Hyperscale Data, a diversified holding company trading on NYSE American under GPUS, is taking this step to reinitiate operations after temporary cessation. This decision marks a strategic move in the cryptocurrency sector, as Sentinum aims to leverage the growing market demand for Bitcoin. The specific site chosen for resumption of mining activities indicates a calculated approach by Hyperscale Data to maximize its operations and profitability in the cryptocurrency space.
news.headline: Hyperscale Data subsidiary to resume Bitcoin mining in Montana by June 10, 2025. (Numbers not provided)

news.summary: The positive topline results of BiomX's phase 2 trial on BX211 for treating diabetic foot osteomyelitis (DFO) were disclosed in March 2025.
news.headline: BiomX releases Q1 2025 financial results, BX211 phase 2 trial for treating DFO shows positive topline results.

news.summary: On May 10th in Los Angeles, MINISH Technology, a South Korean healthtech company, held a dental seminar and business briefing, their second international event, signaling a significant move in their North American expansion journey. This event marked a crucial milestone for the company as it continues to grow globally.
news.headline: MINISH Technology holds dental seminar in Los Angeles, part of global expansion.

news.summary: In recent days in Singapore, Bitcoin has seen a significant rise, surpassing the $100,000 mark. This surge has led to increased activity in the crypto market, with renewed enthusiasm from investors. Various tokens on the HTX platform have been trending, including Solana Memecoins, Ethereum Memes, AI, and Restaking, indicating a growing interest in these sectors.
news.headline: Bitcoin breaks $100k again, top gainer up 521% on HTX; trading activity surges, investor enthusiasm grows.

news.summary: AtkinsRéalis Group Inc. reported a strong start to the year with Q1 year-over-year increases of 12% in revenue, 25% in Segment Adjusted EBIT, and 50% in diluted earnings per share. The total backlog increased by 17% compared to December 31, 2024, reaching $20.2 billion as of March 31, 2025. Nuclear revenue hit a quarterly record-high of $538.3 million, marking an 80.3% increase, while Segment Adjusted EBIT for Nuclear reached $62.7 million, a 60.8% increase. The company returned $25.7 million to shareholders through share repurchases in Q1 2025. The net cash generated from operating activities was $39.3 million. The company raised its Nuclear revenue outlook for full year 2025 to between $1.9 billion and $2.0 billion and adjusted its Nuclear Segment Adjusted EBIT outlook to between 11% and 13%. Additionally, the company is revamping its Nuclear annual revenue target to between $2.2 billion and $2.5 billion by 2027. Other financial targets for 2025 – 2027 remain the same as previously announced. Attributable net income to shareholders in Q1 2025 increased by 51.9% compared to Q1 2024. The company's total net limited recourse and recourse debt to Adjusted EBITDA ratio was 1.1 as of March 31, 2025, lower than the ratio of 1.7 a year prior.
news.headline: AtkinsRéalis Group Inc. reports strong Q1 2025 results with 12% revenue increase, $538.3M Nuclear revenue, and $223.9M Linxon revenue. Total backlog at $20.2B. Nuclear revenue outlook raised to $2.0B for 2025, and a $2.5B Nuclear revenue target set for 2027. Net income increased by 51.9% year-over-year to $69.1M. Shareholders received $25.7M through share repurchases. Adjusted EPS at $0.57 for PS&PM. Total Adjusted EBITDA from PS&PM stood at $211.5M.

news.summary: CoreWeave Inc. has made a significant technological advancement by becoming the first to deploy Nvidia Corp.'s cutting-edge GB200 Grace Blackwell systems at scale during the first quarter of 2025. This milestone was announced during the company's first earnings call as a public entity after its March IPO. The deployment of Nvidia's GB200 NVL72 instances at scale on CoreWeave's AI cloud platform positions the company as a comprehensive solution provider for AI development and expands its reach within the AI ecosystem. CoreWeave's CEO, Michael Intrator, highlighted the company's strong financial performance, customer growth, and technical achievements, emphasizing their commitment to delivering superior performance and efficiency. The deployment of the new systems supports leading AI developers like Mistral AI, IBM, and Cohere.
news.headline: CoreWeave is first to deploy Nvidia's GB200 Grace Blackwell systems at scale in Q1 2025. Despite revenue beating estimates, CRWV stock falls over 6%.

Sapiens, a prominent software solutions provider for insurance, traded as NASDAQ: SPNS and TASE: SPNS, and played a key role in connecting professionals to exchange valuable insights.
news.headline: Sapiens hosts global client conference in Vienna for insurers, focusing on growth and agility. SPNS stock (NASDAQ: SPNS) reported growth.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on May 15, 2025, Marimaca Copper Corp. shared updates from recent drilling at Pampa Medina Norte, an extension of the Pampa Medina Deposit. The company, trading as TSX:MARI and ASX:MC2, expressed satisfaction with the results.
news.headline: Marimaca extends Pampa Medina Norte discovery, with 68m at 1.20% and 40m at 1.07% CuT. Deep sulphide extension assays pending.

news.summary: User-Friendly Technology in Los Alamitos, Calif., released on May 15, 2025, offers a simple solution to preserve photos, documents, and awards in tribute to veterans. With Memorial Day approaching, families are looking for ways to honor those who served the nation. This innovative tech allows them to easily share memories and commemorate their loved ones.
news.headline: Epson tech aids families in honoring veterans by preserving photos, documents, and awards to share memories.

news.summary: BeiGene Ltd., a Chinese biopharma firm, has reported its first quarterly profit on a GAAP basis with global sales of its flagship blood cancer drug reaching $792 million in the first quarter, while U.S. sales were $563 million. The company, now known as BeOne Medicines Ltd., is relocating its headquarters to Switzerland. Although it showed a profit in the U.S. market, it still reported a net loss in China under a different accounting method. BeiGene's first-quarter net profit under GAAP was $1.27 million, compared to a net loss of $251 million the previous year. The company is closely watched by investors for its progress towards profitability, driven by growing demand for its cancer drugs. It publishes its results in the three jurisdictions where it is listed: Hong Kong, the United States, and mainland China.
news.headline: BeOne Medicines Ltd.(BeiGene) reports first quarterly profit, $1.27M, driven by $792M global sales increase, renaming and relocating HQ.

news.summary: At the upcoming 2025 ICML conference, new findings will be shared regarding the use of golidocitinib as a maintenance treatment for patients with peripheral T-cell lymphoma (PTCL) who showed tumor response following initial systemic therapy. Specifically, the presentation will focus on the 2-year follow-up data from two Phase I/II studies. This analysis will provide insights into the safety and effectiveness of golidocitinib in this patient population. Stay tuned for more information on this topic, which could have significant implications for PTCL management.
news.headline: Dizal to present promising data on golidocitinib & DZD8586 for lymphoma treatment at intl. hematology conferences, including 2-year follow-up on golidocitinib for PTCL patients at 2025 ICML.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Aura Biosciences, Inc. initiated an underwritten public offering including shares of common stock, warrants to purchase common stock, and pre-funded warrants for certain investors. The clinical-stage biotechnology company, trading as AURA on Nasdaq, focuses on developing precision therapies for solid tumors to maintain organ function. The offering, solely by Aura, is dependent on market conditions for completion, with uncertainties regarding timing, size, and terms. This move marks Aura's attempt to raise capital for its innovative oncology solutions.
news.headline: Aura Biosciences plans public offering of common stock and warrants, subject to market conditions.
